name: evomate-cursor-mcp-template
description: Template: Cursor can use EvoMate through MCP tools plus the sidecar observer when shell hooks are available.

sidecar.observe: npm --silent run evomate:observe -- --source cursor --event user_message || true
sidecar.advisor: npm --silent run evomate:advisor -- --source cursor --event advisor_prepare --text || true
sidecar.outcome: npm --silent run evomate:outcome -- --source cursor --event task_completed --outcome success || true
